name: remove-fake-status-controls
title: Remove fake status controls and fix refresh activity
description: Remove exposed manual/demo status controls and make refresh exclude threads whose latest Codex log indicates the agent exited.
creator: dev2019zheng
notes: Removed production manual/demo status controls and commands. Verified latest Agent loop exited logs exclude threads from running status. Checks: typecheck, build, cargo fmt --check, cargo test --workspace, browser screenshot/DOM check, Tauri app bundle build.
